>

the junkyard.

please click on a pic to make it big
 
 
 

    
me at the remains
 

   
rusty frames, cracked right cylinder head cover, broke the billet handlebar mounts
forks don't look bent, though check out the melted final drive (rear mag wheel turned to slag).
Ooo, neat, look at the steel belts that remain from the rear tire!
pipes, oil pan still good
engine may be salvageable
frame has some parts

ts
